headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Honeywell International (HON) After Its Strong Recent Share Price Run?
summary: Wondering whether Honeywell International at around US$237.86 is offering fair value or trading on a premium, especially after its recent run? This article breaks that question down into practical terms you can use. The stock has posted returns of 4.4% over the past week, 11.9% over the past month, 21.4% year to date and 13.8% over the last year. This naturally raises questions about how much of the current valuation already reflects these moves. These returns sit alongside a 35.4% three...

headline: How Honeywell’s AI-Enabled NHL Arena Partnership At Honeywell International (HON) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: Honeywell and the National Hockey League recently entered a multi-year global partnership making Honeywell the Official Building Automation and Energy Management Partner of the NHL, aimed at modernizing arenas, practice facilities and community rinks with AI-enabled, integrated building systems. By helping create more efficient, secure and connected “Rinks of the Future,” Honeywell is extending its building-automation footprint deeper into sports venues and local hockey communities across...
